attribution.interpretation: Of 80 questions: 40 fully correct (50%), 4 retrieval failures (5%), 7 generation failures (9%), 14 corpus gaps (18%), 15 metric artefacts (19%).

gpt4o_advantage.interpretation: GPT-4o significantly outperforms open models on these questions

open_model_competitive.interpretation: Open models match GPT-4o quality at zero cost

all_models_fail.interpretation: These represent corpus gaps or fundamentally hard questions

recommendations.title: Implement query expansion with HyDE
recommendations.description: FM1 (retrieval miss) affects 4 questions. Hypothetical Document Embeddings (HyDE — Gao et al., 2022) generates a hypothetical answer first, then embeds it, improving retrieval for questions whose wording diverges from NDC document phrasing (e.g. 'What is Turkey's 41% target?' vs NDC text 'reduce emissions compared to BAU').
recommendations.expected_impact: Estimated +8-12% HR@5 improvement on hard factual queries
recommendations.cost: ~2× generation cost per query; negligible for thesis scale
recommendations.citation: Gao et al. (2022) Precise Zero-Shot Dense Retrieval without Relevance Labels

recommendations.title: Structured extraction prompts for numeric targets
recommendations.description: FM5 (vagueness) occurs when the LLM produces a general answer despite specific numbers being present in context. A structured prompt that explicitly asks 'Extract the exact percentage, year, and baseline' forces the model to report specific commitments rather than paraphrasing them vaguely. Pydantic output schemas can enforce this structure.
recommendations.implementation: Add extraction schema to generation.py prompt template
recommendations.citation: HyPA-RAG (Kalra et al., 2024) — adaptive-k and structured output

recommendations.title: Expand corpus with NDC3 and national implementation reports
recommendations.description: FM7 (corpus gap) accounts for 18% of failures — questions the system correctly declines to answer because the relevant document is absent. Adding NDC3 submissions (2025 cycle, currently being submitted), national climate action plans, and IPCC AR7 (expected 2027) would cover these gaps.
recommendations.expected_impact: Eliminates FM7 failures; improves context recall on new questions
recommendations.implementation: Run data_collection.py with updated UNFCCC registry URLs
recommendations.cost: One-time re-indexing ~$0.50 for embedding new documents
recommendations.citation: Climate Policy Radar (2024) — UNFCCC corpus maintenance
